description: CompositionBlack shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar with a front buttoned placket, full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, has red leaf print patches on the inner collar, back neck, along the inner placket, inside the mouth of the patch pocket on the left chest and along the cuff placket, and has a curved hemFittingRegularWash careMachine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergentDo not soak or bleachLine dry inside out in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on print/embroideryAn ever-green addition to your wardrobe, this black shirt from probase comes with a twist of leaf print red patches that makes it a perfect urban weekend wear when teamed with jeans, sneakers and a jacket or sweater this winter.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in shirtsHeight: 5'11"; Shoulders: 17.5"
